Meta.title: Multicargo — Global Freight Forwarder | Since 2007
Meta.description: Logistics chaos? Multicargo is your dedicated trade department — air, sea, rail & road from Asia, the Americas, Israel and beyond. 15 years. 6 offices. One call.

Hero.subtitle: We Run Your Imports. You Run Your Business.
Hero.tagline: From a single box to a full container.
Hero.searchPlaceholder: Enter route, cargo weight or container number...
typewriter: Enter route, cargo weight or container number...
Hero.quote: People build too many walls and not enough bridges.

HowItWorks.title: How It Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from your first message to cargo at your door. No specialist knowledge required.
HowItWorks.footer: Works for 1 pallet or 100 containers. From China, Israel, UAE, USA, Brazil — anywhere in the world.

step1.title: Submit Your Request
step1.desc: Share your route, cargo type, weight and preferred delivery mode. No forms — just a message or a call to your personal manager.

step2.title: Get a Route Proposal
step2.desc: Tell us your cargo details and we'll analyse your case — origin, destination, cargo type, urgency — and come back with the most efficient route, mode, and cost breakdown. No guesswork. Pure expertise.

step3.title: We Handle Everything
step3.desc: From pickup to final delivery — Multicargo manages the full chain: booking, customs clearance, tracking and documentation. You stay focused on your business.

About.title: About Multicargo
About.body: Since 2007 we have been moving cargo across the globe. We act as your in-house foreign trade department — sourcing, forwarding, customs and last-mile delivery under one roof.
